name: Vegetable Nut Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms, onions, and green bell pepper to the skillet. Cook until tender but not browned.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked mushroom mixture with grated carrots, chopped celery, sunflower seeds, coarsely chopped walnuts, beaten eggs, and bread crumbs.
4. Stir in dried basil and oregano, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with butter or margarine.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread it evenly.
7. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 1 hour.
8. Remove from the oven and carefully peel away the waxed paper lining from the bottom of the pan.
